_meta.note: Update all PENDING_DEPLOYMENT values after pnpm deploy:mainnet

CampaignFactory.name: CampaignFactory
CampaignFactory.role: Factory + campaign registry. Owner deploys new campaigns and manages the DonationReceipt contract.
CampaignFactory.notes: Ownable. Owner controls campaign creation. No proxy, no upgrade path.

DonationReceipt.name: DonationReceipt
DonationReceipt.role: Soulbound ERC-721 NFT. Minted once per donation. Non-transferable. On-chain SVG metadata.
DonationReceipt.notes: MINTER_ROLE granted to each Campaign contract. DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE held by factory and admin.

Campaign.name: Campaign
Campaign.role: Per-campaign donation vault. Accepts MATIC, tracks milestones, requires dual-sig disbursal.
Campaign.notes: Each campaign is a separate contract instance deployed by CampaignFactory. OPERATOR_ROLE + DIRECTOR_ROLE required for milestone disbursal.

deployer.label: Deployer Wallet
deployer.purpose: Deploys CampaignFactory and DonationReceipt. Becomes factory owner after deployment.
deployer.note: FUND THIS WALLET WITH MATIC BEFORE DEPLOYING. Consider transferring ownership to a Gnosis Safe after deployment.

treasury.label: Platform Treasury
treasury.purpose: Receives any platform fees (currently 0% — no fees).
treasury.note: No platform fee is currently collected. Treasury address is a placeholder for future governance.
